title: Cobblemon Interface: Modded by den1s64
description: A collection of texturepacks created by den1s64.
body:
## Cobblemon Interface: Modded by den1s64

This resource pack is a collection of all my texture packs, combined into a single file.
It was created to simplify installation and usage by unifying various mod interfaces into the Cobblemon Interface style.

### The contents of this pack may change over time:

- New adaptations may be added.

- Existing ones may be removed (for example, if Cobblemon Interface: Modded introduces official support for mods I previously adapted).

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck). 

🎨 And Cobblemon Interface: Modded created by [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck), and [TorchTheDragon](https://modrinth.com/user/TorchTheDragon).

## Supported Mods
- [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)
- [Berry Pouch](https://modrinth.com/mod/berry-pouch)
- [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots)
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
- [Pipez](https://modrinth.com/mod/pipez)
- [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken)
- [Cobblemon Integrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations/versions)
- [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat)
- [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the mods in this pack.

If you have suggestions for mods whose interfaces could be adapted or redesigned in the Cobblemon style, feel free to contact me.

Mail: den1s64dev@gmail.com
